metadata.description: Benchmark-driven local ASR for Apple Silicon — MCP server + agent workflow skills

plugins.name: bestasr
plugins.description: bestASR for agents: bundles the bestasr-mcp MCP server (benchmark-driven ASR routing over stdio — transcribe/recommend/list_backends/list_models/corpus_add, notarized binary auto-downloaded on install) plus workflow skills — transcript (any source → SRT), context-ingest (documents → context.json), and srt-proofread (three-axis correction with immutable timecodes).
